0.1.0

  • Initial release with basic menu management features.
sections.faq:
Can I use this plugin on any WordPress site?

No, this plugin is designed specifically for Patlis platform websites.

What does this plugin do?

It allows you to create and manage digital menus for gastronomy websites.

Can I manage multiple categories and items?

Yes, you can organize your menu into categories and add multiple items with prices, descriptions, and images.

Does it support multiple prices or sizes?

Yes, you can define multiple prices and sizes for each menu item.

Can I display allergens or additional information?

Yes, the plugin supports allergens and additional labels for each item.
